roles.detailed: AI Software Engineer · Backend Architect · Data Scientist

tagline: Building AI systems that scale in production.
bio: AI Software Engineer focused on backend architecture, AI integration, and scalable system design. At A-Team Event GmbH, I build API-driven backend systems with PostgreSQL and Supabase, develop AI-powered workflows using LLMs, and design modern frontend interfaces. Previously at Robert Bosch, I developed anomaly detection pipelines using deep learning and Generative AI, combining data science expertise with production engineering.

projects.title: SmartDoc AI
projects.subtitle: Local RAG-based Knowledge Assistant
projects.desc: End-to-end Retrieval Augmented Generation system using LangChain and Mistral LLM via Ollama for fully local inference. Semantic document retrieval with FAISS and HuggingFace embeddings, and a modern Streamlit interface for privacy-focused document Q&A without external APIs.

projects.title: JobRadar
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Multi-Source Job Aggregator
projects.desc: Full-stack job search platform that aggregates listings across 10 sources and 9 European countries. AI-powered resume parsing and ATS scoring via Groq LLM, JWT authentication, job description scraping with BeautifulSoup, and a sleek Alpine.js + Tailwind frontend. Deployed on Render with Docker.

Developed LLM-powered workflows for event management automation
Implemented API architectures with Supabase and real-time data pipelines
Designed and shipped modern frontend interfaces with Next.js
Designed anomaly detection pipeline using Generative AI and deep learning
Built ETL pipelines with Apache Airflow for automated data processing
Deployed ML models in cloud environments on AWS and Databricks
Reduced false positive rate by 40% using ensemble model approaches
Automated data pipelines reducing processing time by 30%
Built KPI dashboards for manufacturing process monitoring
Improved analysis workflows using Python, SQL, and visualization tools
Applied machine learning techniques to quality assurance processes
Analyzed large datasets using Python and visualization tools
Built interactive business intelligence reports for stakeholders
Developed statistical models for deriving actionable insights
Supported research in intelligent systems and robotics automation
Implemented data collection, labeling, and processing scripts
Contributed to academic research projects and documentation
Worked on network infrastructure and systems engineering
Managed enterprise-level technical operations and documentation
